title: Performance+
body:
# New version with the best performance here: [https://modrinth.com/project/performance-optimized](https://modrinth.com/project/performance-optimized)
Get the best performance for your game.

This modpack includes the best performance and fps booster so you can play with a high quality.

The modpack contains the best mods for performance. But it doesn't contain too many mods, because otherwise performance would be wasted on the modpack.

The modpack is unique, as there are no unnecessary performance degradations just to get a lot of fps. the computing power and the graphics performance are improved with the pack.
